race.comment: GUARANTOR (4) didn't feature last start on the main track here when racing in tougher company, but his form prior was very good. Happy to overlook one disappointing effort, especially with some sting out of the track suiting him today. Can bounce back to his best. CATCH CARTER (2) can sit a touch closer today with the blinkers reapplied and a slightly better draw. He should be nearing peak fitness now and Ramoly knows him well. Won't be far away. TORONADO ROCKET (6) gets Chris Parnham on board today after going under as the race favourite most recently. Draws well again and can be in the finish. KINGS PARK (8) flew home on debut in eye-catching fashion. Can't be left out of calculations.
